subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh is verily He through Whom the Cause was manifested and shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد المظلوم انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق انه لهو الذی به ظهر الامر و لاح
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @station of the Manifestation of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
